'''âr-sh-m''' ('''karasham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hint|hint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hint|hint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-sh-m
|-
! Lemma
| karasham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirasham|thirasham]] || [[word:jirasham|jirasham]] || [[word:shirasham|shirasham]] || [[word:kirasham|kirasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurasham|thuthurasham]] || [[word:jujurasham|jujurasham]] || [[word:shushurasham|shushurasham]] || [[word:kukurasham|kukurasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurasham|thurasham]] || [[word:jurasham|jurasham]] || [[word:shurasham|shurasham]] || [[word:kurasham|kurasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurasham|thurasham]] || [[word:jurasham|jurasham]] || [[word:shurasham|shurasham]] || [[word:kurasham|kurasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therasham|therasham]] || [[word:jerasham|jerasham]] || [[word:sherasham|sherasham]] || [[word:kerasham|kerasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorasham|thothorasham]] || [[word:jojorasham|jojorasham]] || [[word:shoshorasham|shoshorasham]] || [[word:kokorasham|kokorasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorasham|thorasham]] || [[word:jorasham|jorasham]] || [[word:shorasham|shorasham]] || [[word:korasham|korasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorasham|thorasham]] || [[word:jorasham|jorasham]] || [[word:shorasham|shorasham]] || [[word:korasham|korasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrasham|thĂŠrasham]] || [[word:jĂŠrasham|jĂŠrasham]] || [[word:shĂŠrasham|shĂŠrasham]] || [[word:kĂŠrasham|kĂŠrasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharasham|thatharasham]] || [[word:jajarasham|jajarasham]] || [[word:shasharasham|shasharasham]] || [[word:kakarasham|kakarasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharasham|tharasham]] || [[word:jarasham|jarasham]] || [[word:sharasham|sharasham]] || [[word:karasham|karasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharasham|tharasham]] || [[word:jarasham|jarasham]] || [[word:sharasham|sharasham]] || [[word:karasham|karasham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharasham|sharasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharasham|gosharasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharasham|gokisharasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharashamnĂŒ|sharashamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharashamnknĂŒ|gosharashamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashamnĂŒ|gokisharashamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharashamshĂ«|sharashamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharashamnkshĂ«|gosharashamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharashamshĂ«|gokisharashamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashamro|sharashamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashamnkro|gosharashamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashamro|gokisharashamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashamu|sharashamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashamnkmu|gosharashamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashamu|gokisharashamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharashamsher|sharashamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharashamnksher|gosharashamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharashamsher|gokisharashamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharashamng|sharashamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharashamnkng|gosharashamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharashamng|gokisharashamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharashamya|sharashamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharashamnkya|gosharashamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharashamya|gokisharashamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharashamyam|sharashamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharashamnkyam|gosharashamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharashamyam|gokisharashamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashamnĂŒshĂ«|sharashamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashamnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharashamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashamnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharashamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashamnĂŒro|sharashamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashamnknĂŒro|gosharashamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashamnĂŒro|gokisharashamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashamnĂŒmu|sharashamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashamnknĂŒmu|gosharashamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashamnĂŒmu|gokisharashamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashamshĂ«nĂŒ|sharashamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharashamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharashamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashamshĂ«ro|sharashamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashamnkshĂ«ro|gosharashamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashamshĂ«ro|gokisharashamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashamshĂ«mu|sharashamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashamnkshĂ«mu|gosharashamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashamshĂ«mu|gokisharashamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashamronĂŒ|sharashamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashamnkronĂŒ|gosharashamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashamronĂŒ|gokisharashamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashamroshĂ«|sharashamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashamnkroshĂ«|gosharashamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashamroshĂ«|gokisharashamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharashamromu|sharashamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharashamnkromu|gosharashamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharashamromu|gokisharashamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharashamunĂŒ|sharashamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharashamnkmunĂŒ|gosharashamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharashamunĂŒ|gokisharashamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharashamushĂ«|sharashamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharashamnkmushĂ«|gosharashamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharashamushĂ«|gokisharashamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharashamuro|sharashamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharashamnkmuro|gosharashamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharashamuro|gokisharashamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
